entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum L., the target crop for genetic diversity and genome-wide association studies

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: A key aspect of the selection of superior genotypes in crop varietal improvement

entities.name: CROP VARIETAL IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The overall goal of breeding activities to enhance crop quality and resilience

entities.name: WILD RELATIVES
entities.description: Wild species related to chickpea used to introduce genetic variations

entities.name: LANDRACES
entities.description: Traditional local varieties used to enhance genetic diversity in chickpea

entities.name: MOLECULAR MARKERS
entities.description: Tools used to characterize genetic diversity and identify variations

entities.name: SINGLE NUCLEOTIDE POLYMORPHISMS
entities.description: A type of molecular marker involving single base variations, also known as SNPs

entities.name: INSERTIONS AND DELETIONS
entities.description: A type of molecular marker involving the addition or removal of nucleotides, also known as indels

entities.name: PRESENCE/ABSENCE VARIATIONS
entities.description: A type of molecular marker involving the presence or absence of genomic segments, also known as PAVs

entities.name: DIVERSITY ANALYSIS
entities.description: The process of analyzing genetic variations within a population

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE ASSOCIATION STUDIES
entities.description: A powerful strategy (GWAS) used to associate genetic markers with specific traits

entities.name: WHOLE GENOME RE-SEQUENCING
entities.description: A technique used to generate comprehensive genomic data for diversity and association analysis

entities.name: DESI
entities.description: A specific type of chickpea accession

entities.name: KABULI
entities.description: A specific type of chickpea accession

entities.name: WILD ACCESSIONS
entities.description: Wild types of chickpea that exhibit higher genetic diversity compared to landraces

entities.name: NOVEL ALLELES
entities.description: Newly identified genetic variants that offer effective breeding strategies

entities.name: GENE VARIATIONS
entities.description: Variations in gene structure and sequence identified through genomic analysis

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: A key agricultural trait targeted for improvement in chickpea

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of the crop to withstand biological stressors

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of the crop to withstand non-biological stressors

entities.name: POPULATION DESIGN
entities.description: The strategy of selecting a balanced set of genotypes for genomic studies
